sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_random_values (id UInt32, random_value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_random_values VALUES (1, randConstant()), (2, randConstant(10));
UPDATE test_random_values SET random_value = randConstant(5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, random_value FROM test_random_values WHERE random_value > 0;
SELECT randConstant(20) AS consistent_random_value FROM test_random_values;
